messages.content: You are Alice AI, a self-improving, persistent personal assistant. Try telling me about yourself or ask me to help with something.
berikan saya contoh code html hello world

Tentu. Berikut contoh HTML Hello World: ```html Hello World

Hello, World!

``` Kalau mau, saya juga bisa buatkan versi: - super sederhana - dengan CSS dark mode - dengan JavaScript alert “Hello World”

profile.name: Developer
profile.bio: An ambitious coder building autonomous agent networks on clean, efficient cloud containers.
preferences: prefers terminal slate high-contrast dark visual aesthetics

memories.text: Likes responsive, dark slate retro aesthetics and terminal fonts.
Spins up container pods on budget server runtimes.

skills.name: DailySummarizer
skills.description: Compiles activity checkmarks, tool logs, and note counts into a clean markdown dashboard.
skills.systemPrompt: Provide a clean, elegant summary of tasks completed, active diary notes, and diagnostics reports. Format with terminal spacing.

notes.title: Project Aethelgard Node Specs
notes.content: This personal core is configured to operate with 40 built-in system modules, an Express custom API, file-based persistence, and local simulated Webhook gateways to Telegram and Discord.

todos.text: Test digital clock and global timezone viewer tools
Link Telegram bot polling token to live webhook core

learnings.title: Greeting handling should be simple and user-oriented
learnings.description: The prior responses to basic greetings were overly system-focused and not aligned with the user's likely intent.
learnings.details: In this conversation, the user sent simple greetings ('hallo', 'halo', 'hi'). The assistant responded first with repeated offline-mode capability text and then with a developer-style terminal menu. A better behavior is to answer greetings naturally and invite the user to ask for help, only mentioning system state when relevant.

learnings.title: User Preference Matching
learnings.description: Learned that user prefers orange colors (#ea580c) and modern Swiss/sans-serif typography with cozy terminal widgets.
learnings.details: Analyzed chat history on 2026-06-28. Synced the UI theme colors from corporate blue to orange-accented dark retro design.

learnings.title: Syntax Highlighting Implementation
learnings.description: Installed robust syntax-highlighting for code blocks inside ReactMarkdown renderer.
learnings.details: Corrected rendering issue where JSON string blocks inside model chat windows lacked color-coded key-value pairs.

messages.content: You are Alice AI, a self-improving, persistent personal assistant. Try telling me about yourself or ask me to help with something.
Halo! Ada yang ingin kamu kerjakan?
cek semua tools mu apakah berfungsio semua

Saya tidak bisa memverifikasi “semua tools” sekaligus dari lingkungan ini, karena yang benar-benar bisa saya panggil di sesi ini hanya tool yang diekspos ke saya sekarang.

Yang saya lihat:
- Tool yang benar-benar tersedia untuk saya panggil di sesi ini: `functions.zz`
- Daftar 40 tools yang kamu sebut ada di instruksi tampak seperti capability profile, tapi tidak terekspos sebagai callable tool langsung di runtime percakapan ini.

Hasil cek aktual:
- `functions.zz` → berhasil dipanggil, tidak error

Kesimpulan:
- Tidak bisa membuktikan semua 40 tool berfungsi dari sini
- Yang bisa saya pastikan saat ini: mekanisme tool call hidup, minimal 1 tool responsif

Kalau kamu mau, saya bisa bantu dengan 2 opsi:
1. Buatkan checklist audit untuk 40 tools itu
2. Kalau runtime-mu bisa mengekspos tool-tool tersebut satu per satu, saya bisa uji semuanya dan laporkan status pass/fail per tool
You are Alice AI, a self-improving, persistent personal assistant. Try telling me about yourself or ask me to help with something.
berikan saya contoh code html hello world

Tentu. Berikut contoh HTML Hello World: ```html Hello World

Hello, World!

``` Kalau mau, saya juga bisa buatkan versi: - super sederhana - dengan CSS dark mode - dengan JavaScript alert “Hello World”
